summary: Cache/stale-build verification PASSED — the frontend currently served at https://seat-reserve-67.preview.emergentagent.com is the LATEST build. All five latest-only markers render correctly on a 390x844 viewport with no bundling error, no blank screen, and no red-screen. (1) Departures list renders instantly; the 'boarding soon' subtitle shows 4 upcoming flights and the FlatList emits a 'PAST FLIGHTS' section header followed by the Seoul FA 019 card carrying a green 'LANDED' pill and a 'GALLERY / PHOTOS' label — this whole section only exists in the newest build, so its presence confirms the fresh bundle. (2) Tapping the Seoul past card opens /flight/<seoulId> which shows the 'THIS FLIGHT HAS LANDED' banner, the gallery-button labeled 'VIEW PHOTOS FROM THE NIGHT', and NO book-button (book-button count=0). (3) Direct navigation to /admin-login shows pin-input + pin-submit; entering 602214 loads admin-list (Crew Control > FLIGHTS) with FA 019 Seoul as LANDED and Tokyo/Lagos/Berlin(FA 511)/Rio(FA 072) as UPCOMING, and the bottom tab bar shows the new 'CREW' tab next to DEPARTURES and MY TRIPS. (4) Opening the upcoming Tokyo flight from Departures shows the book-button, selecting Business Class (testID class-business) then CHOOSE TABLE navigates to /seatmap?flightId=...&classKey=business where the availability-banner is visible and reads '12 of 12 tables available' with the live pulse dot over the floor plan (FC 1-4 + tables 1-12 + BAR + WC visible). Console errors: only the previously-known non-blocking RN-Web deprecation warnings (props.pointerEvents, shadow* style props) — no new errors. No fixes were needed.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking, emitted from a dependency.
Carry-over console warning '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' — non-blocking, emitted from a dependency.

action_items: None — stale-bundle issue is confirmed RESOLVED. The preview URL is serving the latest features (PAST FLIGHTS/Seoul-LANDED/gallery button, /admin-login + Crew tab, seatmap availability banner).
critical_code_review_comments: No new code review comments this iteration — this was a served-build verification only, no source changes.
As noted before: on web, the guest onLongPress FOREIGN AFFAIRS logo cannot enter admin (mouse fires press, not longPress) — /admin-login route works as the intended web fallback.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 latest-build markers verified on the live preview URL)

seed_data_creation: No new data created. Seed flights (Tokyo FA 808, Lagos FA 234, Berlin FA 511, Rio FA 072, Seoul FA 019) all render as expected. No test bookings created this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stale-cache issue is resolved on the served build at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Key markers to re-verify quickly if this recurs: [data-testid=departures-list] renders → scroll to see 'PAST FLIGHTS' + Seoul FA 019 LANDED card; tap Seoul → [data-testid=gallery-button] present, [data-testid=book-button] absent; /admin-login + PIN 602214 → [data-testid=admin-list] loads + 'CREW' bottom tab visible; upcoming Tokyo → Business Class ([data-testid=class-business]) → CHOOSE TABLE → /seatmap → [data-testid=availability-banner] shows '12 of 12 tables available'. Note the Business Class selector CHOOSE TABLE lives inside a scrollable area — scroll the flight detail page down before clicking. Admin PIN is 602214 (from backend/.env).
rca_of_issue: Original 'seeing the old version' symptom RCA: Metro/expo web served a cached JS bundle from before the PAST FLIGHTS / admin / seatmap-availability features were added. Mitigation done by main agent (clearing Metro cache + restarting Expo) has taken effect — the preview URL now serves the up-to-date bundle containing all five latest-only UI elements verified above.
